name: Banana Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Puree bananas in a blender.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the pureed bananas, eggs, sugar, butter, and vanilla until well blended.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
7. Pour in the banana mixture.
8. Mix until just combined.
9. Spoon batter into well-greased 2 1/2-inch muffin cups.
10. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
11. Remove from pan and let cool before serving. Makes about 12 muffins.
